title: Quant Engine
description: C++20 quantitative finance engine : Black-Scholes, Monte Carlo, Greeks, Portfolio VaR, framework de benchmark.
ats_bullet_fr: - Développement d'un moteur quantitatif en C++20 pour la finance (Black-Scholes, Monte Carlo, VaR, benchmarks, pybind11).
ats_bullet_en: - Developed a C++20 quantitative finance engine (Black-Scholes, Monte Carlo, VaR, benchmarks, pybind11).
